productDisplayName: Nike Men's AS SS Trainin White T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline, with orange short sleeves, nike swoosh embroidered on the right chest, and has mesh panels on the side and back FittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours at 30 degree C Do not use softeners or bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Do not iron Do not dry clean Whether you are heating it up on the field or getting cosy on a weekend, this nike t-shirt will definitely get you noticed. Engineered with Nike's Dri-Fit technology, it wicks away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable on and off the court. Team it with tracks, shorts or jeans for the complete sporty look.
